indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: Couch is too large and not designed for sleep, taking up valuable floor space.

indicators.name: coffee table
indicators.rationale: Coffee table is cluttered and obstructs floor space, making it difficult to move around.

indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: Hard floor is not comfortable for sleeping and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows make it difficult to control light and temperature, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no curtains
indicators.rationale: No curtains make it difficult to control light and temperature, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no bed
indicators.rationale: No bed makes it impossible to sleep in this space.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for sleep (Primary). The presence of a couch and coffee table takes up valuable floor space, while the hard floor and lack of windows make it difficult to control light and temperature. There is no bed, making it impossible to sleep in this space.
